sections.title: Speaking to him for the first time

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: Who treads upon my grave?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I seek your wisdom.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: Indeed, I feel you have beheld the far places in the heavens.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: My Lord instructs me to help you.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: Here is a mould to make a token for our Lord; a mould for the unholy symbol of Zamorak.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have come to kill you.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: The might of mortals, to me, is as the dust to the sea.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: Who treads upon my grave?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have come to seek a blessing.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: I see you have the unholy symbol of our Lord. It is blessed with the Lord Zamorak's power.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: Come to me when your faith weakens.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: I see you have the unholy symbol of our Lord. I will bless it for you.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: The symbol of our Lord has been blessed with power!

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: My master calls.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: No blessings will be given to those who have no symbol of our Lord's love.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need another mould for the unholy symbol.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: To lose an object is easy to replace. To lose the affections of our Lord is impossible to forgive.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: One you already have, another is not needed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Leave me be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have come to kill you.

lines.speaker: Spirit of Scorpius
lines.text: The might of mortals, to me, is as the dust to the sea.
